info.title: T-Square LMS API Docs
info.description:
# T-Square LMS API

A comprehensive Learning Management System (LMS) REST API built with Laravel 13 + Sanctum.

## Authentication
All protected endpoints require a **Bearer token** obtained from `POST /api/login`.
Include it in the `Authorization` header:
```
Authorization: Bearer {token}
```

## Roles
| Role | Description |
|---|---|
| `admin` | Full system access |
| `instructor` | Manage own groups, attendance, schedule |
| `student` | Enroll in courses, take exams, view certificates |
| `receptionist` | (Coming soon) |

## Response Format
All endpoints return JSON in this shape:
```json
{
  "status": "success | error",
  "message": "Human readable message",
  "data": { ... }
}
```

post.description:
POST /api/admin/courses/{course}/previews/chunked-upload

Multipart fields:
  chunk         – the binary slice (max 2 MB)
  chunk_index   – 0-based position of this slice
  total_chunks  – how many slices in total
  filename      – original file name (used to preserve the extension)
  preview_index – which lesson/preview row this video belongs to

Returns on intermediate chunks:
  { status: "chunk_received", chunk_index: N }

Returns on the last chunk:
  { status: "complete", video_url, duration_seconds, video_provider, size }
post.summary: Receive one video chunk and, on the final chunk, assemble the full file

get.description:
Returns the file as a base64-encoded JSON payload so that:
  1. Laravel CORS middleware can add its headers (not stripped by streaming).
  2. Browser extensions like IDM do not intercept the XHR request.

Query params: same filters as index + format=pdf|excel
get.summary: GET /api/admin/schedule/export
tags:
Admin: Schedule

Provides a centre-wide schedule view with filtering

get.description:
Query params:
  date           string  Y-m-d  filter by effective session date (day mode)
  date_from      string  Y-m-d  range start (week Sat or month 1st)
  date_to        string  Y-m-d  range end (week Fri or month last day)
  view_mode      string         day|week|month — used for export labels only
  instructor_id  int            filter by instructor
  status         string         filter by session status
  group_id       int            filter by group
  per_page       int    default 15

Alternative professional and fast for the has_attempt without additional query

is_passed_before.description: Check if the student has passed any previous attempt for this exam

start_date.description: On create: must be today or later unless is_historical is true, in which case it must be on or before today. On update: any valid date.

is_historical.description: Create only. When true, allows a past start_date, marks past sessions as completed without attendance records, derives group status from end_date, and skips instructor assignment notification.

choices.description: بنبعت الاختيارات بس بنشيل منها عمود is_correct للأمان

parent_id.description:
parent_id is nullable — admin may create both top-level and child categories.
When provided it must resolve to an existing category.

billing_name.description: Required only when course is paid (validated in withValidator()).

choice_text.description: At least 2 choices and maximum 6 choices

name.description: حقل name يتم تعبئته آلياً في prepareForValidation

insta_url.description: ممنوع تعديل رقم الهاتف من هنا

name.description:
'unique' is intentionally omitted from name — slug uniqueness is
handled by the model's updating hook, which ignores the current record.

parent_id.description: Prevent a category from becoming its own parent.

is_completed.description: Admin intent: control course completion and optionally re-issue the certificate.

action.description: Determine the operation type: replace or append

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
